Article Title: IPL 2026: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi touches Sunil Gavaskar’s feet, then smashes 97 vs SRH - Watch
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's humble gesture with Sunil Gavaskar (Image: X)

Poll Which part of Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s innings impressed you the most? Power-Hitting Record-Breaking Knock

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, the 15-year-old batting sensation, continues to win hearts both on and off the field. While his fearless strokeplay has taken IPL 2026 by storm, his humility and respect for the game’s legends have earned him admiration beyond cricket.Ahead of Rajasthan Royals ’ Eliminator clash against Sunrisers Hyderabad, the teenage prodigy was seen touching the feet of legendary batter Sunil Gavaskar during a pre-match practice session, a gesture that quickly went viral among fans.The heartwarming moment took place while Gavaskar and former India coach Sanjay Bangar were presenting the pre-match show on the ground alongside TV host Jatin Sapru. Sooryavanshi, who was warming up nearby, spotted the duo and immediately paused his training session to walk over and seek their blessings in traditional Indian fashion.However, the youngster didn’t stop at just winning hearts before the game. Later in the evening, he lit up the Eliminator with one of the most explosive innings of the IPL 2026 season.The Rajasthan Royals opener smashed a breathtaking 97 off just 29 deliveries, dismantling the SRH bowling attack and powering RR to a massive 243/8. Before the match, the teenager was seen meditating calmly on the field, but once the game began, he unleashed complete destruction on the SRH bowlers with 12 sixes and five fours.Sooryavanshi equalled Suresh Raina ’s record for the fastest IPL playoff fifty in just 16 balls and also broke Chris Gayle ’s record for most sixes in a single IPL season. He narrowly missed out on a century after falling for 97 while attempting another big shot.Jofra Archer then starred with the ball, dismissing Abhishek Sharma, Travis Head and Ishan Kishan as SRH were bowled out for 196 ending their IPL 2026 season with a defeat against Rajasthan Royals for the 1st time since 2023. Rajasthan Royals sealed a dominant 47-run victory to advance to Qualifier 2 against Gujarat Titans.
Article Summary: Rajasthan Royals beat Sunrisers Hyderabad by 47 runs in IPL 2026 Eliminator. Teenage prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi was seen touching the feet of legendary batter Sunil Gavaskar during a pre-match practice session. The gesture quickly went viral among fans. Later in the evening, he lit up the Eliminator with a breathtaking 97 off just 29 deliveries, powering RR to a massive 243/8.

Article Title: Watch: Kavya Maran greets Vaibhav Sooryavanshi after SRH exit IPL 2026
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi shakes hand with SRH's Kavya Maran (Screengrab)

Poll What do you think is the key factor for Rajasthan Royals' success in IPL 2026? Strong batting lineup Bowling performance Team strategy

NEW DELHI: Rajasthan Royals ’ teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi once again found himself at the centre of attention after his breathtaking knock against Sunrisers Hyderabad in the IPL 2026 Eliminator.But apart from the fireworks on the field, one post-match moment involving SRH co-owner Kavya Maran also grabbed fans’ attention online.After Rajasthan Royals sealed a commanding 47-run victory at the Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium in Mullanpur, Maran was seen greeting the 15-year-old batter and shaking hands with him near the boundary ropes.The Indian Premier League later shared the clip on social media, and it quickly went viral among cricket fans.Watch:The gesture came after Sooryavanshi delivered one of the most destructive innings in IPL playoff history. The left-handed opener smashed 97 runs off just 29 deliveries, hammering 12 sixes and five fours at a stunning strike rate above 334. His explosive innings powered Rajasthan Royals to a massive total of 243/8 in 20 overs.Sooryavanshi narrowly missed out on a century but still managed to rewrite several records during the knock.The teenager crossed Chris Gayle’s tally for the most sixes in a single IPL season and continued his remarkable rise as the breakout star of IPL 2026.While Rajasthan’s batting dominated the contest, Jofra Archer ensured Hyderabad never truly threatened during the chase. The England pacer picked up three important wickets and removed key batters early to put SRH under pressure.Nitish Kumar Reddy top-scored for Hyderabad with 38, while Ishan Kishan added 33 at the top.Sunrisers Hyderabad were eventually bowled out for 196 in 19.2 overs, ending their campaign just short of the final stages. Rajasthan Royals now move on to Qualifier 2, where they will face Gujarat Titans for a place in the IPL 2026 final.
Article Summary: Rajasthan Royals beat Sunrisers Hyderabad by 47 runs in IPL 2026 Eliminator. Teen sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi hit 97 runs off just 29 deliveries. SRH co- owner Kavya Maran was seen greeting the 15-year-old batter and shaking hands with him near the boundary ropes.

Article Title: Siddaramaiah vs DK Shivakumar: Why Congress faces its toughest balancing act in Karnataka
Article Text:
Status quo

If Siddaramaiah quits the post

Mid-term polls

NEW DELHI: With the power tussle between Karnataka chief minister Siddaramaiah and deputy chief minister DK Shivakumar showing no signs of easing, Congress leaders are holding back-to-back meetings to find a way out of the crisis.Amid mounting speculation, fuelled by media reports and party sources, that Siddaramaiah could step down from the top post, Congress general secretary and Karnataka in-charge Randeep Singh Surjewala on Wednesday sought to play down the buzz, insisting that no formal decision has been taken by the party."Currently, no meeting of the legislature party has been called by the Congress party . No other decision has yet been taken. As things evolve, we will inform you. I cannot tell you what will happen after one month, 20 days, tomorrow, six months or one year — that is speculation," Surjewala said.Even as the Congress leadership attempted to contain the speculation, news agency PTI reported that Siddaramaiah has sought time from the governor and is scheduled to host a breakfast meeting with cabinet colleagues at his official residence on Thursday, further fuelling political suspense in Bengaluru.Meanwhile, the Congress leadership is keen to avoid a Rajasthan-like situation and is attempting to work out an amicable formula acceptable to both leaders and their respective camps.Here are three possible political scenarios that could unfold in Karnataka in the coming days:Both Siddaramaiah and DKS were summoned to Delhi by the Congress high command on Tuesday and held a series of meetings with Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge and Rahul Gandhi.However, after the meeting, Congress general secretary (organisation) KC Venugopal dismissed speculation and said the discussions were focused entirely on the upcoming Rajya Sabha and Karnataka Legislative Council elections.On Wednesday, Randeep Surjewala - the high command’s envoy sent to Karnataka - also remained tight-lipped and said the party would make decisions not in favour of individuals, but in favour of Karnataka.If the status quo remains, DKS may have to wait two more years for Congress to project him as the chief ministerial candidate in the 2028 assembly elections.If Siddaramaiah quits the CM post, it will pave the way for DKS to take over the top job in Karnataka.For an amicable transition of power, Rahul Gandhi reportedly asked Siddaramaiah, in a one-on-one meeting, to consider taking up a national role in the party. He was asked to respond within a week.If Siddaramaiah agrees to shift to the Rajya Sabha, it may warrant a change in the leader of opposition post, currently held by Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge.The Congress president is set to get another Rajya Sabha term next month, and many consider Siddaramaiah a strong contender for the LoP post to help the Congress strengthen its OBC vote base.According to sources, Rahul Gandhi’s team also discussed a possible cabinet berth for Siddaramaiah’s son Yathindra as part of the negotiations.The possibility of shifting the 77-year-old leader to the Rajya Sabha has gained momentum ahead of elections to four Upper House seats from Karnataka in June. Congress is confident of winning at least three seats.It remains to be seen whether the CM quietly agrees to let Shivakumar replace him or puts up resistance, potentially opening the way for a third candidate as a compromise.Amid the ongoing tussle over the chief ministerial post, the Congress government faces the danger of losing its majority in the Vidhan Soudha.There are 23 Vokkaliga MLAs in the grand old party who are supporting DKS.In a scenario where the Congress high command decides to continue with Siddaramaiah as the chief minister, these MLAs who are openly backing DKS can pull out support from the government.Meanwhile, 9 Kuruba MLAs and 34 Lingayat MLAs support Siddaramaiah, making the CM choice a Catch-22 situation for the high command.Karnataka BJP president BY Vijayendra predicted that Karnataka may face early assembly polls and that the Congress government will not complete its full term even after a change in chief minister.“The Congress high command has today acknowledged that the party government led by Siddaramaiah has failed to provide good governance during the last three years, and has therefore decided to change the chief minister,” he told reporters in Shivamogga.“After marathon meetings in Delhi yesterday, a decision has finally been taken that Siddaramaiah should resign,” he claimed.Vijayendra said the issue was not about who would become the next CM, but about the condition of the state administration.“We have reached a stage where everyone has to think about the direction in which the state is heading. Due to internal conflicts, the administration had completely collapsed,” he charged.
Article Summary: Siddaramaiah and DKS were summoned to Delhi by the Congress high command on Tuesday and held a series of meetings with Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge and Rahul Gandhi. Congress leadership is keen to avoid a Rajasthan-like situation and is attempting to work out an amicable formula acceptable to both leaders and their respective camps.

Article Title: When influence meets impact: Creators who chose fitness at the Times Internet half marathon Delhi edition
Article Text:
Creators who chose fitness at the Times Internet half marathon Delhi edition

RS1313: A Family That Runs Together

Payal Jain and Tena Jain: Celebrating Sisterhood Through Fitness

Diksha Singhi: Redefining Strength and Confidence

Dr. Kumar Shubham: Balancing Passion, Profession, and Fitness

In today’s digital era, social media has a powerful influence on society. At the Times Internet Half Marathon Delhi edition, that influence was seen in its most inspiring form, not just through content creation but through action.Several digital creators participated in the marathon, using their presence and platforms to encourage fitness, movement, and healthier lifestyles among their audiences. Their participation reflected something much larger than a race: a growing shift towards creators using their influence to inspire meaningful change.At its core, the Times Internet Half Marathon aims to celebrate fitness on a massive scale because health should always remain a priority. More than just a sporting event, the marathon has become a platform that brings people together through a shared spirit of discipline, energy, and community.In a world where influencers shape conversations every day, it was inspiring to see creators choosing the Times Internet Half Marathon as a space to promote positivity, wellness, and togetherness.RS1313, a family loved by over a million people online, brought their signature warmth and togetherness to the marathon.Known for creating content as a family, they showed up the same way they live united.Watching the entire family run together became a beautiful reminder of how fitness can strengthen not just individuals, but relationships too. Their participation reflected the true spirit of community and togetherness that the Times Internet Half Marathon stands for.Payal Jain and Tena Jain brought vibrant energy and the spirit of sisterhood to the event. With lakhs of followers engaging with their reels and content, the duo inspired many young people to take a step towards fitness and an active lifestyle.Their presence added positivity and relatability to the marathon, proving that fitness journeys become even more meaningful when shared.Body-confidence creator Diksha Singhi became one of the most inspiring faces at the marathon as she completed the 10K with determination and a smile throughout the race.Her presence sent a powerful message: strength is never defined by body size but by mindset, courage, and self-belief. Through her participation, Diksha motivated countless individuals who struggle with self-doubt, reminding them that every body is capable of greatness.The Times Internet Half Marathon continues to celebrate individuals who use their voice and influence to uplift others and create meaningful impact.Dr. Kumar Shubham wears many hats: orthopaedic doctor, fitness model, marathoner, and cyclist. Yet beyond all his achievements, he represents something deeply inspiring: the ability to prioritize health and fitness despite a demanding life.Through both his lifestyle and digital presence, he consistently motivates his audience to embrace fitness as an essential part of life, not an optional one. His participation reflected the marathon’s larger vision of encouraging people to invest in their well-being, regardless of how busy life gets.The Times Internet Half Marathon Delhi edition was more than a race; it was a living canvas of stories, people, emotions, and inspiration. From seasoned runners to first-time participants, from families to influencers, the event brought together individuals from different walks of life under one shared purpose: celebrating movement, health, and human connection.As thousands ran through the streets together, the marathon once again proved that fitness is not just personal; it is collective. And when influential voices choose to lead by example, the impact reaches far beyond the finish line.
Article Summary: At its core, the Times Internet Half Marathon aims to celebrate fitness on a massive scale because health should always remain a priority. More than just a sporting event, the marathon has become a platform that brings people together through a shared spirit of discipline, energy, and community.

Article Title: 'Keep yourselves hydrated': PM Modi lists precautions amid heatwave, urges to not forget animals, birds
Article Text:
PM Modi (Image credit: ANI)

PM warns against ignoring heat-related symptoms

IMD issues severe heatwave warning for Delhi-NCR

Severe heatwave conditions persist across several states





Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Wednesday urged citizens to take precautions amid rising temperatures and worsening heatwave conditions across several parts of the country.In a series of posts on social media, PM Modi appealed to people to stay hydrated, carry water while stepping out and extend support to those affected by the scorching heat.“Temperatures are continuously rising in different parts of the country, and along with this, the many difficulties caused by the heat in daily life are also increasing. I urge all my fellow citizens to take as many precautions as possible,” he wrote.The Prime Minister’s remarks come as the India Meteorological Department ( IMD ) warned that large parts of Central and Northwest India are likely to continue experiencing heatwave to severe heatwave conditions over the next few days.PM Modi also urged citizens not to ignore symptoms such as dizziness, nausea and fatigue, warning that extreme heat could lead to heatstroke if left untreated."If someone around you suddenly feels faint, experiences weakness, or appears unwell, immediately take them to a cool and shaded place. Give them water, ORS, or other fluids to provide relief to the body. Children, the elderly, and people working in the sun are the most affected during this scorching heat.If not addressed in time, this condition can turn into a serious problem like heatstroke. In such times, your vigilance and care can save a life. "He also appealed to people to check on elderly family members, keep them hydrated and avoid afternoon heat."Whenever possible, make it a point to call your parents, grandparents, maternal grandparents, and other loved ones to inquire about their well-being."The Prime Minister further encouraged citizens to keep water for birds and animals outside homes and shops, saying, “In these difficult days, let us look after one another with complete sensitivity and compassion.”The IMD has issued a two-day severe heatwave warning for the Delhi-NCR region, with the maximum temperature likely to touch 45 degrees Celsius on Wednesday.However, some relief is expected later this week as thunderstorms and rainfall may occur in parts of Delhi-NCR from May 29 onwards.Severe heatwave conditions prevailed in many pockets of Vidarbha and Chhattisgarh, while isolated areas of East Uttar Pradesh and East Madhya Pradesh also witnessed extreme heat.Heatwave conditions were additionally reported in parts of Uttarakhand, Haryana, Rajasthan, Bihar, Odisha, Telangana and Coastal Andhra Pradesh.
Article Summary: PM Narendra Modi urges citizens to stay hydrated, carry water and extend support to those affected by the scorching heat. IMD has issued a two-day severe heatwave warning for the Delhi-NCR region, with the maximum temperature likely to touch 45 degrees Celsius.

Article Title: NBA trade rumor: Lakers eye $77 million star to build dangerous Luka Doncic duo
Article Text:
Luka Doncic. Image via: Lynne Sladky/ AP

Which teams are interested in Malik Monk



Malik Monk. Image via: Rocky Widner/ NBAE via Getty Images

Category Details Player Malik Monk Current Team Sacramento Kings Rumored Team Los Angeles Lakers Contract Status Multi-year contract Salary Cap Hit Approx. $77-78 million Trade Likelihood Moderate Latest Insider Update Lakers linked through mock trade scenarios Potential Return Rui Hachimura, Dalton Knecht, draft compensation

What insiders are saying about the trade rumors



Contract details and salary cap implications



How the trade could impact both teams



The Los Angeles Lakers are once again searching for backcourt help, but this offseason feels more urgent than previous years. After a disappointing playoff exit against the Oklahoma City Thunder, the focus inside the organization has shifted toward surrounding Luka Doncic with proven scorers and reliable depth. One name gaining traction in league circles is Malik Monk, whose long-standing connection with the Lakers and microwave scoring ability make him a natural fit.Monk is currently tied to a deal worth roughly $77 million with the Sacramento Kings, but a proposed trade package involving Rui Hachimura and Dalton Knecht has sparked fresh speculation about a possible reunion in Los Angeles.The Lakers are not the only team expected to monitor Malik Monk’s availability, but their interest stands out because of familiarity and roster need. Los Angeles badly lacked consistent scoring outside its stars during the postseason. Bench production became unreliable, and the team struggled to keep pace offensively against younger, deeper opponents.According to Sports Illustrated’s Ryan Shea, the Lakers could revisit Monk as a cost-effective offensive weapon. “The Kings are currently tanking, sitting at 12-31 and holding the 14th seed in the Western Conference,” Shea wrote.“In this deal, they move Malik Monk’s contract, worth around $60 million over the next three seasons, and acquire Rui Hachimura on an expiring deal.”For Sacramento, the appeal is different. The Kings would receive players who better match a longer-term timeline while gaining financial flexibility. Hachimura’s expiring contract could open cap space, while Knecht remains an intriguing developmental piece after limited minutes as a rookie.League executives still view Monk as one of the NBA’s better sixth-man scorers. His value increased significantly after his recent seasons in Sacramento, where he rebuilt his career and became a dependable offensive creator.“Hachimura provides a similar scoring level as Monk, averaging 12.1 points per game this season,” Shea added. “They also add Dalton Knecht on a cost-controlled contract, a player with untapped potential who was the 17th overall pick in the 2024 NBA Draft.”The Lakers would receive more than scoring. Monk already understands the pressure that comes with playing in Los Angeles. That familiarity matters for a team trying to maximize its immediate championship window around Doncic.Monk’s contract remains manageable compared to many starting guards around the league. ESPN previously reported : “Free agent guard Malik Monk intends to sign a four-year, $78 million deal, including a player option, to return to the Sacramento Kings.”That structure gives Sacramento flexibility if trade talks ever become serious. Monk does not carry a no-trade clause, which simplifies negotiations. For the Lakers, moving Hachimura’s expiring money could also prevent a difficult free agency decision later this summer.A Monk reunion would not suddenly make the Lakers title favorites, but it would address one of their clearest weaknesses. The team needs quicker scoring bursts, better guard depth, and another creator who can ease pressure on Doncic during long stretches of the season.Sacramento, meanwhile, could pivot toward younger pieces without fully tearing apart the roster. Knecht may benefit from expanded opportunities, while Hachimura could still provide instant offense in a different system.The bigger picture for Los Angeles remains simple. Everything now revolves around building the right roster around Doncic. Star power alone was not enough this season. The Lakers learned that quickly in the playoffs. Adding a proven scorer like Monk may not dominate headlines, but internally, it could be viewed as one of the smarter moves available this summer.
Article Summary: Malik Monk is currently tied to a deal worth roughly $77 million with the Sacramento Kings. A proposed trade package involving Rui Hachimura and Dalton Knecht has sparked fresh speculation about a possible reunion in Los Angeles. Los Angeles badly lacked consistent scoring outside its stars during the postseason.

Article Title: IPL 2026 Orange Cap: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi reclaims top spot after 97-run knock vs SRH
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi

Rank Player Runs Strike Rate 100s / 50s 1 Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (RR) 680 242.85 1 / 4 2 Sai Sudharsan (GT) 638 157.92 1 / 7 3 Heinrich Klaasen (SRH) 624 160 0 / 6 4 Shubman Gill (GT) 616 161.67 0 / 6 5 Ishan Kishan (SRH) 602 182.42 0 / 6

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has moved to the top of the Orange Cap standings after his innings of 97 off 29 balls against Sunrisers Hyderabad in the IPL Eliminator in Wednesday. The Rajasthan Royals batter reached 680 runs from 15 matches at a strike rate of 242.86, going past the rest of the field in the run chart.Sooryavanshi’s knock came while Rajasthan Royals posted 243 for eight. The 15-year-old attacked the SRH bowling unit, including Pat Cummins, and hit 12 sixes during his innings on a flat pitch. He kept scoring freely through the innings before getting out on 97, just short of a century.The innings also came in a game where Rajasthan Royals went on to win by 47 runs after Jofra Archer played a key role with the ball, breaking SRH’s batting lineup.With this performance, Sooryavanshi now leads the Orange Cap race. Sai Sudharsan of Gujarat Titans is second with 638 runs from 14 matches at a strike rate of 157.92. Heinrich Klaasen of Sunrisers Hyderabad is third with 624 runs from 15 matches at a strike rate of 160.Shubman Gill of Gujarat Titans is fourth with 616 runs from 13 matches at a strike rate of 161.67. Ishan Kishan is fifth with 602 runs at a strike rate of 182.42.
Article Summary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi hit 97 off 29 balls against Sunrisers Hyderabad. Rajasthan Royals batter reached 680 runs from 15 matches at a strike rate of 242.86. Sai Sudharsan of Gujarat Titans is second with 638 runs from 14 matches. Heinrich Klaasen of Sunriser Hyderabad is third with 624 runs. Shubman Gill is fourth with 616 runs from 13 matches.

Article Title: Norway Chess: R Praggnanandhaa shocks World No. 1 Magnus Carlsen in classical; 3rd straight Armageddon win for Divya Deshmukh
Article Text:
R Praggnanandhaa, Magnus Carlsen, and Divya Deshmukh (Photo by Michal Walusza/Norway Chess)

R Praggnanandhaa vs Magnus Carlsen (Photo by Michal Walusza/Norway Chess)

Divya’s dream debut continues: Third straight Armageddon scalp

Bibisara Assaubayeva vs Divya Deshmukh (Photo by Michal Walusza/Norway Chess)

Elsewhere: Gukesh and Humpy suffer Armageddon defeats

D Gukesh vs Alireza Firouzja (Photo by Michal Walusza/Norway Chess)

ALSO READ:

NEW DELHI: Remember the 2024 Norway Chess? In Round 3 of that edition, an 18-year-old Rameshbabu Praggnanandhaa secured his first-ever classical victory over Magnus Carlsen . Since then, plenty has changed. Pragg has grown two years older, Carlsen is now a father, and Norway Chess has shifted base to the capital city of Oslo. But when the two chess titans clashed again on Wednesday, the Deichman Bjørvika library saw no change in the script.Before the start of Round 3 on Wednesday, Indian Grandmaster R Praggnanandhaa found himself at the bottom of the tally with just one point. By his lofty standards, World No. 1 and five-time world chess champion Magnus Carlsen did not have an ideal start to his home campaign either, having fallen to Alireza Firouzja in the opening round before scraping past Vincent Keymer in Armageddon in the next. However, Carlsen getting comprehensively beaten by Praggnanandhaa in classical chess was something very few would have anticipated, making the feat incredibly special for the 20-year-old from Chennai.The young Indian's struggles since mid-2025 have been visible to the public eye. Yet, it was a completely unrecognisable, fearless version of Praggnanandhaa that showed up against one of the greatest ever to grace the game of 64 squares.Playing with the white pieces, Praggnanandhaa unleashed highly aggressive kingside ideas in the Najdorf variation, utilising early h4 and f4 thrusts to apply immediate pressure. Carlsen accepted the material gains offered but severely underestimated White’s piece coordination and a dangerous passed c-pawn. Pragg’s active rooks and tactical knight manoeuvres gradually overwhelmed the home favourite.Black’s exposed king and advancing g-pawn ultimately proved futile against precise conversion and sustained positional control in a tense endgame, resulting in a memorable 62-move victory for the Indian youngster.Carlsen's disappointment was clear to see after resigning the game; he spent a couple of seconds looking up and gasping weirdly to display his immense frustration. Fortunately for the organisers, there was no table-banging at the end this time.With this massive win, Praggnanandhaa has catapulted himself to the second spot in the open section standings with 4.5 out of 9 points.The day brought more joy for Indian chess fans through Divya Deshmukh's third consecutive Armageddon triumph in the Norway Chess Women tournament. Making her debut in the elite field, the 20-year-old from Nagpur remains completely undefeated. The list of world-class opponents she has taken down is staggering: women's world champion Ju Wenjun in Round 1, India women's No. 1 Koneru Humpy in Round 2, and now the reigning three-time women's world blitz champion, Bibisara Assaubayeva.Playing with the black pieces, Divya successfully absorbed Bibisara's attacks twice on Wednesday, first in the classical encounter and then in the tiebreak. After securing a solid draw in the classical game, Divya held the psychological advantage of draw-odds in the Armageddon decider, requiring only a draw with Black to secure the match victory.In the tiebreak, Bibisara adopted a flexible English setup, but Divya equalised comfortably before seizing the initiative with a sharp central break on move 25... b4. She then executed a flawless tactical sequence beginning with 26... Bxe4.Black’s active rook penetration and superior knight coordination completely dominated the ensuing endgame, repeatedly checking White’s king into passivity. Though Bibisara defended stubbornly, Divya’s relentlessly active pieces and precise control ensured there was no way through under pressure, handing the Indian teenager another crucial match victory.Aside from the headliner between Magnus and Pragg, the global chess community had its eyes locked on the battle between Alireza Firouzja and World Championship challenger D Gukesh. The reigning world champion candidate was taking on a rampant tournament leader who held a perfect 6/6 score while playing through a foot injury.Gukesh successfully managed to stop the Firouzja juggernaut from scoring a third consecutive classical victory, holding the Frenchman to a draw. However, the Indian could not replicate that stability in the tiebreak, faltering with the white pieces as Firouzja claimed the Armageddon win. On Thursday, Gukesh takes on Magnus, who now finds himself at the bottom of the table.In another open section tiebreak, Germany's No. 1 Vincent Keymer, playing with White, fell to American grandmaster Wesley So.In the women's category, Indian veteran Koneru Humpy suffered another heartbreaking Armageddon defeat, losing this time to defending Norway Chess Women champion Anna Muzychuk.With this result, Humpy remains anchored to the bottom of the table with 2 points out of a possible 9. Meanwhile, in an all-Chinese Armageddon clash, Zhu Jiner defeated reigning world champion Ju Wenjun.
Article Summary: Rameshbabu Praggnanandhaa beats Magnus Carlsen in classical game. Divya Deshmukh defeats Bibisara Assaubayeva in Armageddon decider. World No. 1 and five-time world chess champion Carlsen resigns after 62 moves.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi scripts history, becomes first batter to...
Article Text:
Rajasthan Royals' Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (AP Photo)

680* - Vaibhav Sooryavanshi (RR, 2026)

(RR, 2023) 616 - Shaun Marsh (PBKS, 2008)

Most sixes in an IPL innings by an Indian:

12 - Vaibhav Sooryavanshi vs SRH, 2026

12 - Vaibhav Sooryavanshi vs SRH, 2026 Eliminator

11 - Murali Vijay vs RR, 2010

Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi delivered one of the greatest batting exhibitions in IPL history during the 2026 Eliminator, smashing records at a staggering rate while dismantling Sunrisers Hyderabad with a jaw-dropping 97 off just 29 balls.Representing Rajasthan Royals in Mullanpur, the teenage sensation unleashed complete chaos on a flat batting surface, taking apart even seasoned operators like Pat Cummins with fearless strokeplay and unbelievable power-hitting.Sooryavanshi hammered 12 sixes during his explosive innings, repeatedly sending the ball deep into the stands as SRH’s bowlers ran out of answers. Cummins himself conceded four sixes to the 15-year-old and ended with forgettable figures of 0 for 64 in four overs.The RR opener narrowly missed breaking Chris Gayle’s all-time record for the fastest IPL century after falling on 97, just one hit away from surpassing Gayle’s iconic 30-ball hundred from 2013.But even without the century, Sooryavanshi rewrote several IPL records during the innings — including one of Gayle’s most iconic milestones. The teenager surpassed Gayle’s 14-year-old record for the most sixes in a single IPL season and now sits alone at the top with 65 maximums.He also now holds the record for the most powerplay runs ever scored in a single IPL season, overtaking David Warner’s long-standing mark from 2016.The teenager smashed eight sixes inside the powerplay during the Eliminator, the most ever in the first six overs of an IPL innings.Sooryavanshi also became the first batter in IPL history to hit 10 or more sixes three times in a single season.His 11-plus sixes in the knockout clash also established a new record for the most sixes ever hit in an IPL playoff innings.The innings further strengthened his remarkable IPL 2026 numbers, with Sooryavanshi now becoming the highest-scoring uncapped batter in a single IPL season.He also equalled his own record for the most sixes by an Indian batter in a single IPL innings.At one stage, Rajasthan looked set for an even bigger total after racing to 180 for 2 in 13 overs, with Sooryavanshi turning the match into a one-man spectacle. His opening partner Yashasvi Jaiswal was largely reduced to watching from the other end while the teenager launched balls across every part of the ground.Yet despite all the records and applause, the slow walk back to the pavilion after his dismissal perhaps summed up the night best. Sooryavanshi knew history was within touching distance, and even after producing one of the greatest IPL innings ever played, the 15-year-old still looked devastated at missing out on something even bigger.
Article Summary: Rajasthan Royals' Vaibhav Sooryavanshi smashed 12 sixes during the 2026 Eliminator. The 15-year-old smashed 97 off just 29 balls, breaking Chris Gayle’s all-time record for the fastest IPL century. He also equalled his own record for most sixes by an Indian batter in a single IPL innings.

Article Title: MLB trade rumors: Diamondbacks star Ketel Marte emerges as Yankees’ biggest trade target before August deadline
Article Text:
MLB trade rumors: Diamondbacks star Ketel Marte emerges as Yankees’ biggest trade target before August deadline (Image via Getty)

Potential trade packages for Ketel Marte

Which teams are interested in Ketel Marte?



What insiders are saying about the Yankees trade rumors



Contract details and how the trade could affect the Yankees

The New York Yankees are once again being linked to a major name ahead of the MLB trade deadline on August 3, 2026. This time, the rumors are centered around Arizona Diamondbacks star Ketel Marte, a three-time All-Star and former NLCS MVP who has quietly become one of the most talked-about names in baseball trade discussions.According to Bleacher Report’s Tim Kelly, the Yankees could look at Marte as a perfect fit for their infield if general manager Brian Cashman decides to make a big roster move before the deadline. Marte is currently under a six-year, $116.5 million contract that runs through 2031, making him one of the biggest possible names available if Arizona chooses to listen to offers.If the Yankees seriously push for Marte, Arizona would likely ask for multiple young players and top prospects in return. The Diamondbacks would also probably want MLB-ready infield depth if they move their biggest star. The Yankees could build a package around young prospects, while players like José Caballero may also become important pieces because of their defensive flexibility. Tim Kelly explained that New York could reshuffle the entire infield if Marte arrives.Kelly wrote, “Between José Caballero and Jazz Chisholm Jr., the Yankees have some flexible chess pieces in the infield.That may come in handy when general manager Brian Cashman tries to upgrade the infield.” He also suggested that Jazz Chisholm Jr. could move to third base if Marte takes over second base duties.The Yankees are not expected to be the only team watching Marte closely. If Arizona makes him available, several contenders could enter the race quickly because Marte remains one of the best switch-hitting infielders in baseball.So far this season, Marte is batting .273 with 56 hits, nine home runs, and 32 RBIs in 51 games. He is also coming off back-to-back All-Star seasons, which only increases his trade value. Still, the Yankees stand out because they are actively searching for more offense and infield stability as they try to strengthen their World Series chances.The Athletic insider Ken Rosenthal revealed earlier that the Yankees are actually on Marte’s five-team no-trade list. That means Marte would personally need to approve any deal to New York.Rosenthal reported, “Marte has a five-team no-trade list, the Athletics, New York Yankees, Pittsburgh Pirates, Giants and Cardinals.” That detail could become a major obstacle if the Yankees seriously pursue the Diamondbacks star this summer.Marte’s contract runs through 2031, though he has a player option for the final season. The long-term deal gives stability, but it would also add another massive salary commitment to the Yankees payroll.The move could also directly affect the future of Jazz Chisholm Jr.. Chisholm is currently in a contract year, and the Yankees still have not agreed to a long-term extension with him. If Marte joins New York, the Yankees may need to completely reshape their infield plans for the future.
Article Summary: The New York Yankees are once again being linked to a major name ahead of the MLB trade deadline. This time, the rumors are centered around Arizona Diamondbacks star Ketel Marte. The Yankees could look at Marte as a perfect fit for their infield if general manager Brian Cashman decides to make a big roster move before the deadline.

Article Title: 'New six machine': Chris Gayle makes Vaibhav Sooryavanshi admission after 15-year-old breaks his IPL record
Article Text:
Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and Chris Gayle

NEW DELHI: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi lit up the IPL 2026 Eliminator with a stunning knock against Sunrisers Hyderabad. The 15-year-old Rajasthan Royals opener smashed 97 runs off just 29 balls, including 12 massive sixes, helping his team register a dominant 47-run victory and move into Qualifier 2.Although he missed out on a century, his fearless batting grabbed attention from cricket fans and legends around the world. Chris Gayle , whose long-standing IPL record for most sixes in a season was broken by Sooryavanshi, praised the youngster after he reached 65 sixes in the tournament, going past Gayle’s 59 from 2015.“What a phenomenal player Vaibhav is. Great entertainment young man! New Six machine," Gayle wrote.After the match, Sooryavanshi revealed he was not thinking about personal milestones during his explosive innings. “I got to know after the game," he said when asked about narrowly missing the fastest IPL hundred. He added, “My focus was on hitting a six. I will score centuries in future, but the focus was on getting maximum runs for the team."India T20I captain Suryakumar Yadav also praised the teenager’s fearless batting. “Chin up boy. What a CLASS innings, you’ve taken everyone’s breath away," Surya wrote on X, calling him a future star.While Sooryavanshi stole the headlines, Jofra Archer played a major role with the ball. The England pacer rattled SRH early by dismissing Abhishek Sharma, Travis Head and Ishan Kishan during the powerplay.Chasing a huge target, Hyderabad never recovered from those early blows and were bowled out for 196 in 19.2 overs. Rajasthan Royals will now face Gujarat Titans in Qualifier 2 for a place in the IPL final.
Article Summary: Rajasthan Royals beat Sunrisers Hyderabad by 47 runs in IPL 2026 Eliminator. Teenager Vaibhav Sooryavanshi hits 12 sixes in stunning innings. Chris Gayle hails 'phenomenal player' after breaking IPL record.

Article Title: Kim Kardashian’s ex-boyfriend Ray J hospitalized after brutal MMA knockout by Supa Hot Fire on Adin Ross’ event amid ongoing heart health concerns
Article Text:
Photo Credit: Momodu Mansaray

Ray J’s health concerns grow after knockout defeat in Las Vegas



American rapper and reality television star Ray J was hospitalized after suffering a knockout loss during an MMA fight against Supa Hot Fire at Adin Ross’ UFC Apex event in Las Vegas. Reports claimed that Ray J was admitted to hospital nearly two hours after the bout ended on Saturday night. Doctors are now monitoring him for concussion symptoms and possible heart-related complications after the brutal fight shocked fans online.The rapper’s health had already raised concerns before he entered the ring. Earlier this year, Ray J was hospitalized with severe pneumonia and heart problems. Reports suggested he may even require a pacemaker in the future. Despite warnings about his condition, the singer still chose to compete in the celebrity MMA event. Before the fight, he explained that his motivation came from wanting to prove himself for his children and continue pushing forward despite his medical struggles.The fight started positively for Ray J as he appeared aggressive in the opening moments and briefly pressured Supa Hot Fire against the ropes. However, the momentum quickly changed when Supa Hot Fire landed a heavy right hook that knocked the rapper unconscious during the co-main event.According to reports by TMZ, Ray J remained under medical observation for two days after the incident while doctors continued evaluating his condition. Medical staff were reportedly concerned about signs linked to concussion symptoms as well as issues involving a slower heartbeat. The situation became even more serious because of the rapper’s earlier hospitalization this year.Back in January, Ray J had shared details about his poor health on social media. He explained that doctors had warned him about the condition of his heart and advised him to focus on recovery and healthier habits. The rapper also mentioned that he remained hopeful about improving his condition. He was staying disciplined and avoiding unhealthy routines.This is not the first major health scare for the singer. In 2021, he also battled a serious case of pneumonia. It required emergency treatment. Despite these repeated setbacks, Ray J decided to take part in the MMA event. This was because he wanted to inspire his children and show resilience during difficult times.Ray J shares two children, daughter Melody Love and son Epik Ray, with his former wife Princess Love. He previously dated Kim Kardashian in the early 2000s before the pair eventually separated on friendly terms.
Article Summary: Ray J was knocked out by Supa Hot Fire during the co-main event of the UFC Apex event in Las Vegas on Saturday night. Reports claim he was admitted to hospital nearly two hours after the bout ended. Doctors are now monitoring him for concussion symptoms and possible heart-related complications. Earlier this year, Ray J was hospitalized with severe pneumonia and heart problems.

Article Title: World’s highest-paid athletes in 2026: Cristiano Ronaldo tops the list with $300 million with Messi and LeBron James following
Article Text:

Poll Who do you think will be the highest-paid athlete in 2027? Cristiano Ronaldo Lionel Messi LeBron James Shohei Ohtani

For years, the debate around the world’s highest-paid athletes has usually centred on trophies, records, and championship rings. This time, though, the money itself is telling a different story. The latest earnings rankings for 2026 are packed with familiar football icons, NBA legends, boxing stars, and Formula 1 champions, yet the scale of their income now stretches far beyond sport alone, reflecting the growing global influence of celebrity branding, streaming exposure, and international sponsorship markets.Some are earning more from sponsorships than salaries. Others are building business empires while still competing at the highest level. A few, surprisingly, are closer to retirement than the beginning of their careers. Forbes lists 2026’s highest-paid athletes and their billion-dollar endorsements, highlighting how modern sports stars increasingly operate as global entertainment brands, investors, entrepreneurs, and social media powerhouses simultaneously.Cristiano Ronaldo once again leads the list of the world’s highest-paid athletes, and the gap between him and the rest of the field remains enormous.The Portuguese forward reportedly earned around $300 million across the last 12 months, helped heavily by his contract with Al-Nassr. What stands out is that Ronaldo’s commercial appeal appears almost untouched by age. At 41, he still attracts global sponsors, social media engagement and licensing deals at a scale few athletes have ever managed. His recent investment in Spanish football club UD Almería also hints at a growing interest in ownership and long-term business projects beyond playing.Canelo Álvarez remains boxing’s biggest financial draw. The Mexican star reportedly brought in about $170 million, fuelled by major Saudi-backed fight agreements and blockbuster global audiences. Even after a difficult result against Terence Crawford, Álvarez’s commercial strength barely slowed. His fights continue attracting enormous streaming numbers, while his growing business portfolio;including fuel stations, convenience stores and beverage brands ; has expanded well beyond boxing.For Lionel Messi, the move to Inter Miami CF continues paying off both financially and commercially. His estimated earnings reportedly reached $140 million this year. Messi’s influence inside Major League Soccer appears difficult to measure fully. Ticket prices, television attention and sponsorship activity around Inter Miami all surged after his arrival. Off the pitch, endorsement agreements with global brands remain one of the strongest parts of his income.LeBron James may be nearing the final stretch of his NBA career, but his business empire keeps expanding. The Los Angeles Lakers star reportedly earned nearly $138 million over the past year, making him in the list of highest-paid athletes in the world. Much of that comes away from basketball itself. James has investments across media, sport and technology, while his partnerships with luxury and lifestyle brands remain highly valuable. Retirement speculation continues surrounding the 41-year-old, though financially he appears stronger than ever.Shohei Ohtani might have the most unusual earnings profile on the list. Although his contract with the Los Angeles Dodgers is massive, much of the money is deferred into future years. Japanese and international brands continue competing for partnerships with Ohtani, whose popularity stretches far beyond baseball audiences. Experts suggest he may now be one of the most commercially valuable athletes in Asia.Stephen Curry remains one of basketball’s biggest commercial stars even as his long relationship with Under Armour recently ended. The Golden State Warriors guard reportedly earned around $124.7 million this year through salary, endorsements, and entertainment projects. Curry has also expanded into publishing and film production, showing how modern athletes increasingly build media careers alongside professional sport.Spanish golfer Jon Rahm continues benefiting from LIV Golf’s huge financial backing. His estimated earnings reportedly crossed $107 million despite ongoing uncertainty around the future of the Saudi-backed league. Rahm still maintains endorsement deals with luxury and sporting brands, although discussion around LIV Golf’s stability has become louder in recent months. Even so, the financial rewards remain difficult for elite golfers to ignore.Karim Benzema remains among football’s highest earners after his move to Saudi Arabia. The former Real Madrid CF striker reportedly earned around $104 million. His transfer from Al-Ittihad to Al-Hilal earlier in the year generated fresh headlines, particularly after disputes surrounding his previous contract situation. Commercially, Benzema still benefits from partnerships with sportswear and fragrance companies.Kevin Durant has quietly become one of sport’s biggest investor-athletes. The NBA forward reportedly crossed the billion-dollar career earnings mark while still actively playing. Now with the Houston Rockets, Durant continues balancing basketball with media production, venture investing and sponsorships. His business interests appear almost as wide-ranging as his basketball career itself.Lewis Hamilton closes out the top ten after reportedly earning around $100 million. Although his first season with Scuderia Ferrari did not deliver a championship challenge, his commercial appeal remains enormous. Hamilton’s partnerships in fashion, luxury goods and entertainment continue setting him apart from most Formula 1 drivers. He has also become increasingly involved in film production and lifestyle businesses, reflecting how elite athletes now often operate far beyond their sport alone.
Article Summary: Cristiano Ronaldo once again leads the list of the world’s highest-paid athletes. The Portuguese forward reportedly earned around $300 million across the last 12 months, helped heavily by his contract with Al-Nassr. Lionel Messi, Canelo Álvarez, LeBron James and Shohei Ohtani round out the top five.
